name: wizpay-core
description: Institutional-grade task execution engine for batched USDC payroll on Arc.
author: DeSeti (WizPay)

scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w landing-page && npm run build -w wizpay_router
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w landing-page
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:contracts
